LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CRAIG GOLD'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE, A COPY OF THE MOTION IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B, AND CCSF HAS ADVISED THE COURT THAT THE MOTION WAS NEVER SERVED. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Continued To Jan-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to January 3, 2014 per Court Order filed November 25, 2013 granting in part Plaintiff's ex parte application. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Teresa Tan, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4272, for defendant and moving party;
Craig Gold, plaintiff and opposing party, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has leave to allege clearly a mandatory duty that defendant breached to recover under Gov't 815.6. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Continued To Oct-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CRAIG GOLD's Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint is off calendar. The moving party failed to provide a proof of service, a copy of the motion in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B, and CCSF has advised the court that the motion was never served. Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Continued To Aug-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CRAIG GOLD, TEL. NO. 240-9579, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. TERESA TAN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4272 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - MS. TAN INFORMED THE COURT THAT THERE WAS A FILING BY THE PLAINTIFF ASKING FOR ADDITIONAL TIME SINCE HE IS ACTING IN PRO PER. The Court adopted its tentative ruling because Plaintiff is not present in court and may seek relief later on. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 15 days leave to amend because no opposition was filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)


* * * THE MATTER WAS RECALLED ON THE RECORD DUE TO THE LATE APPEARANCE OF THE PLAINTIFF at 10:30 a.m. AFTER THE MATTER WAS CALLED ON THE RECORD AND AN ORDER ALREADY SIGNED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ADVISED TO APPEAR AT THE EX-PARTE CALENDAR AND GIVE NOTICE TO MS. TAN TO SEEK RELIEF OF WHATEVER HE IS SEEKING * * *
